macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Fed Holds Interest Rates Steady with Record Dissents
items.summary: The Federal Reserve decided to keep interest rates unchanged, marking the most FOMC dissents since October 1992. Jerome Powell plans to remain on the Fed board, citing concerns over central bank independence.

items.title: Jerome Powell Speaks After Potentially Final Fed Meeting
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell addressed the market following the Fed's rate hold decision on April 29, 2026, amid discussions of it being his last meeting. CNBC analysts highlight strategies for stocks with mega cap earnings looming.

items.title: Make-or-Break Day for Stocks Amid Rising Energy Prices
items.summary: Markets face high stakes with uncomfortable rises in energy prices, including gasoline contracts at 52-week highs and spot WTI near $107. Investment committee discusses top strategies ahead of Fed news and earnings.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds Firm Near $76K After Rebounding from Dip
items.summary: Bitcoin is consolidating near $74,500-$76,000 after hitting a 10-week high of $78,000, supported by strong buying interest amid easing Middle East tensions. Technical indicators suggest potential breakout to $84,000.

items.title: Bitcoin Sees Record $176.8B Inflows in April Despite 3-Year Low Trading Volume
items.summary: Bitcoin recorded $176.8 billion in inflows in April 2026, reversing five months of outflows, but trading volume dropped 21% to $141.76 billion over 30 days, hitting a 3-year low and raising sustainability concerns.

items.title: Crypto Perpetual Futures Liquidations Reach $142.2 Million in 24 Hours
items.summary: The crypto perpetual futures market saw approximately $142.2 million in liquidations over the past 24 hours, reflecting heightened volatility amid recent price movements.

items.title: Crypto Market Capitalization Stable at $2.57 Trillion Amid Mixed Asset Movements
items.summary: The overall crypto market cap remained steady around $2.57 trillion in the past 24 hours, with individual assets showing varied directions following a growth phase.

items.title: Institutions Buy 93,000 Bitcoin as Paul Tudor Jones Praises It Amid FOMC Anticipation
items.summary: Institutions purchased 93,000 Bitcoin in the last 30 days, with BlackRock's IBIT seeing $983 million inflows; Paul Tudor Jones called Bitcoin the greatest scarcity asset ahead of a pivotal FOMC meeting.

items.title: CLARITY Act Anticipated as Major Boost for Crypto Regulation
items.summary: Discussions highlight the upcoming CLARITY Act as a significant regulatory development expected to provide much-needed clarity for the crypto industry.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nioh 3 Announced with PS5 Demo Available Now
items.summary: Team Ninja and Koei Tecmo revealed Nioh 3 during June's PlayStation State of Play, allowing soulslike fans to play a demo immediately on PS5. The game is slated for a 2026 release.

items.title: Bloodstained Sequel 'The Scarlet Engagement' Revealed at State of Play
items.summary: ArtPlay announced a new Bloodstained game, The Scarlet Engagement, during the June PlayStation State of Play, diverging significantly from the original Ritual of the Night.

items.title: Final Fantasy Tactics - The Ivalice Chronicles Set for September Launch
items.summary: A remaster of Final Fantasy Tactics titled The Ivalice Chronicles was revealed and is launching in September, highlighted during June's State of Play.

items.title: Silent Hill f Release Date Advanced Significantly
items.summary: Silent Hill f is coming sooner than expected, as announced in the June 2025 PlayStation State of Play alongside other major franchise reveals.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass June 2025 Wave 1 Lineup Confirmed
items.summary: Microsoft unveiled the full list of games joining Xbox Game Pass in the first wave of June 2025, ahead of the Xbox Games Showcase.

items.title: No More Heroes Dev Reveals New Ultraviolent Sci-Fi Game
items.summary: Suda51 and Grasshopper Manufacture announced a new over-the-top action game blending No More Heroes and Dead Rising elements.

items.title: Helldivers 2 Unveils 'Force of Law' Warbond
items.summary: Helldivers 2 revealed the new Force of Law Warbond, available soon for players in the cooperative shooter.

items.title: Dragon Ball Project: Multi Name and Network Test Dates Revealed
items.summary: The real name of Dragon Ball Project: Multi was disclosed along with dates for a new network test.

items.title: Original Four Mortal Kombat Games Coming to PS4 and PS5
items.summary: Players will soon access the original four Mortal Kombat titles on PS4 and PS5.

items.title: Marathon Faces Crisis with Dwindling Players and Free-to-Play Rumors
items.summary: Marathon is in crisis amid flops in updates, player mockery, sales, and rumors of going free-to-play following Sony's investment.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Alphabet Reports Q1 Revenue Up 22% YoY to $109.9B, Stock Jumps 6%+
items.summary: Alphabet announced first-quarter earnings with revenue of $109.9B (vs. $107.2B estimate) and Google Cloud revenue up 63% to $20B. The company's profit soared 81% YoY to $62.6B, driven by its AI investments.

items.title: Samsung Reports Q1 Revenue Up 69% YoY to ~$90.2B with Record Operating Profit
items.summary: Samsung Electronics reported first-quarter revenue of ~$90.2B and operating profit up 756% to ~$38.5B, driven by AI-linked memory demand.

items.title: Qualcomm Reports Q2 Revenue Down 3% YoY but Jumps 12%+ on Data Center Progress
items.summary: Qualcomm reported Q2 revenue of $10.6B (down 3% YoY) but rallied after announcing a top hyperscaler will begin using its chips later this year, signaling headway in the data center market.

items.title: Motorola Launches Razr Fold with Native Stylus Support
items.summary: Motorola introduced its first book-style foldable phone, the Razr Fold, featuring native stylus support, a capability not found in Samsung's most recent flagship.

items.title: Valve's Steam Controller Arrives
items.summary: Valve has released its Steam Controller, with reviewers sharing their initial impressions of the device.

items.title: Amazon Announces Major Expansion with OpenAI Partnership
items.summary: Amazon announced a major expansion of its partnership with OpenAI involving co-development of a new platform, as the company's $200 billion AI investment begins showing results with AWS segment sales growth of 24% in Q4.

items.title: EU Investigates Meta for Inadequate Child Protection on Instagram and Facebook
items.summary: A preliminary EU investigation found that Meta is not adequately keeping minors off Instagram and Facebook.

items.title: Humanoid Robots to Work as Baggage Handlers at Tokyo Airport
items.summary: Tokyo airport is deploying humanoid robots to work as baggage handlers.

items.title: Uber Adds Hotel Booking Feature to Its App
items.summary: Uber is expanding its app functionality to include hotel booking capabilities for users traveling away from home.
